TC-S5-004-01.description: Click Translate on text document, select German → English, verify new text file created with English content

TC-S5-004-02.description: Translate image with German text to English, verify new image has English text overlaid

TC-S5-004-03.description: Verify original text in image is masked/covered before overlay

TC-S5-004-04.description: Translate PDF with German text, verify new PDF has English text in same layout positions

TC-S5-004-05.description: PDF with images and text, verify only text is translated, images remain unchanged

TC-S5-004-06.description: Verify translated document has '_translated' suffix in filename

TC-S5-004-07.description: Translate document twice (English → German → French), verify multiple renders created

TC-S5-004-08.description: Translate Arabic text to German in image, verify RTL text handled correctly

TC-S5-004-09.description: Click Translate, verify loading indicator shown during processing

TC-S5-004-10.description: Translation completes, verify UI auto-switches to display translated document

TC-S5-004-11.description: Multi-paragraph text document, verify all paragraphs translated maintaining structure

TC-S5-004-12.description: Image with multiple text regions, verify all regions translated and positioned correctly

TC-S5-004-13.description: Large PDF (10+ pages), verify all pages translated successfully

TC-S5-004-14.description: Translation fails (network error), verify error message displayed gracefully
